focus: Clear the final UNVERIFIED carry-over items, then audit the remaining P2-heavy clusters around skill-graph durability, session bootstrap/resume semantics, coverage-graph query drift, memory-save/hook-state hardening, and documentation parity.

graphEvents.detail: The final two carry-over UNVERIFIED items were cleared: extractSpecTitle now throws on read failure, while session-prime still silently swallows startup-brief import failures and moves into STILL_OPEN.
Coverage-graph query drift remains live on current main: coverage_gaps and uncovered_questions still share the same implementation branch, so the review-graph contract is not meaningfully separated.

Session-resume caller-context binding and the hook-state/predecessor-lineage save-path complaints are no longer active regressions on current main; the remaining session backlog is concentrated in minimal-mode payload drift.

The residual doc-layer parity tail is now evidence-backed: mcp-code-mode README inventory/troubleshooting guidance and folder_routing.md still drift from the shipping runtime and canonical save contract.
